description:
E-commerce sites will generate excitement for their products with this animated flash sale template. This light blue template can be used to share information about a flash sale, reveal your deal, mystery event, discount promotion, or special pricing. This template includes the following customizable design elements to help you make more sales:
Call to action to landing page
Logo at top and bottom
Space to showcase multiple products

All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
